calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-08-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tom and Amy Slankard are present.
Attorney Nils Christophe Rosenquest appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sanford Hood is present.
Attorney Paul Esformes representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was not filed.

The trial date of FEB-14-2012 is vacated.
